title: Basic JavaScript Form Events
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Form Events. Focus on implementing Form submit event correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Form Events
description: Create a function that uses Form submit event and Input and change events together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Form Events Project
description: Build a small application that applies Form submit event, Input and change events, Focus and blur events in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Form Events
description: The following code has bugs related to Form submit event. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Form Events
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Form submit event and Input and change events.
